original: This ring-shaped piercing bears a bright red stone of hyper-concentrated geddanium, a gemstone favored by scaled creatures the galaxy over. While wearing any geddanium piercings, teasing scaly foes will be more effective - but your scaled opponents will deal 30% more tease damage to you.
